author: tersec
content:
`nimbus-besu-1` is stuck because of a Besu fake invalid:
```
2026-07-01 07:33:40.380+0000 | nioEventLoopGroup-3-6 | INFO  | MainnetBlockValidator | Invalid block 28884 (0x533c701d306b26cd4232f7c299474bbb88e7ad3dba31a992a152234d7f5006f4): Optional[Block processing error: transaction invalid transaction nonce 2987 does not match sender account nonce 2986 for sender 0x3208b0c57c3ec41fd8887d7c208f3e80fbdc502b. Block 0x533c701d306b26cd4232f7c299474bbb88e7ad3dba31a992a152234d7f5006f4 Transaction 0x103ea3223da5af4cc8da87800dd6461c57e7605aa536635d12111d7e3b0bc415]
```
But https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-6.ethpandaops.io/slot/38534 shows that CL block was finalized + payload was revealed + https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-6.ethpandaops.io/slot/38535 built on that payload, etc.

author: barnabasbusa
content: any cl team has debug logs about which p2p bids are coming in ?

author: b.hartnett
content: It looks like lodestar is sending Nimbus EL invalid block access lists on glamsterdam-devnet-6. We are rejecting newPayloadv5 calls because the blockAccessList received is '0x' empty byte string but this isn't a valid BAL. An empty BAL should be encoded as 0xc0 empty RLP list.
